question_text: What is the primary purpose of WAI-ARIA in web accessibility?
primary_text: Explain the purpose of WAI-ARIA 1.2 and describe its model of roles, states, and properties.

secondary.text: Explain how ARIA can enhance assistive technology support for dynamic content and custom user interface components.

question_text: Which of the following could best be described as a civil rights or non-discrimination law?

Which of the following could best be described as a multi-national standard?
Which of the following is an example of a procurement law?

The Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) applies to which groups?

The 21st Century Communications and Video Accessibility Act (CVAA) applies to which of the following?

According to the Accessible Name and Description Computation algorithm, what should be the accessible name for the link in the following code snippet?

```
[Acme widgets](acme.html)
```
primary_text: Implement accessible names and descriptions for interactive controls using appropriate naming and description techniques.

question_text:


question_text: With all else being equal, which of the following would be the best way of creating a level 1 heading?

question_text: Which of the following is a reason why should you usually avoid using `role="application"`?
primary_text: Evaluate scenarios where the application role may be used and justify when it should be avoided.

question_text: Which of the following is **NEVER** a valid landmark role?
